chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1308 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Bandhani, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the Respondents Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< After arguing the matter at some length, with the consent of learned counsel for the parties, this petition is disposed of in the terms that the petitioner will file Application before Respondent No.4 for redressal of his grievances, who will decide the same within 30 (thirty) days. In view of above, the petition is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
